overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Odyssey showing a character walking through the ancient Greek city of Amphissa in Lokris. The journey begins at a monumental sundial terrace, ascends through a vine-covered pergola, crosses a central plaza with a distinctive watchtower and burning brazier, continues through columned processional streets, ascends grand ceremonial stairs past a golden Athena statue, and concludes in a covered market colonnade.

scene_state.functional_zone: monumental terrace with sundial base and pergola

events.description: character begins ascending the stone steps beneath the pergola

agents.ego_description: walking up stone stairs beneath a vine-covered pergola, passing a large sundial monument

notable_agents.action: NPC in orange tunic ascending the stairs ahead of the character

entered.detail: large carved stone base with sundial markings and geometric patterns
tall statue of a woman in green draped robes standing on a pedestal
decorative low wall with geometric cutout patterns surrounding planters
stone column structure with wooden lattice roof covered in climbing vines

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at a monumental terrace featuring a large sundial base and a towering female statue. The character walks forward and begins ascending a wide staircase beneath a vine-covered pergola, following an NPC in orange clothing. The space is partially sheltered by the pergola structure, creating dappled light patterns on the stone pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: central civic plaza with watchtower and ceremonial fire

events.description: exits the covered pergola into the open sunlit plaza
location text 'Lokris - Amphissa' appears on screen

agents.ego_description: crossing the open plaza toward a tall stone tower, passing a burning ceremonial brazier

notable_agents.action: robed figure standing near the burning brazier observing the surroundings

entered.detail: tall multi-story stone tower with red base and blue banner hanging from the side
large bronze bowl with flames rising from it, situated in a reflecting pool
monumental stone pillars with decorative capitals lining the plaza edge

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the pergola into bright sunlight, the scene opens into a spacious civic plaza paved with cobblestones. A prominent bannered watchtower rises ahead while a burning ceremonial brazier flickers to the right. The location text 'Lokris - Amphissa' appears as the character crosses the plaza, passing scattered pedestrians and monumental columns.

scene_state.functional_zone: processional way with columns and benches

events.description: turning left to follow the processional path toward the grand stairs

agents.ego_description: walking along the column-lined street toward a grand ceremonial staircase

notable_agents.action: woman in orange dress walking ahead toward the staircase

entered.detail: stone seating with blue fabric drapery and potted plants beside it
wide ceremonial stone steps leading upward to a higher terrace
tall statue of a robed male figure holding a staff on a pedestal

segments.scene_description: Leaving the central plaza, the character enters a processional way lined with tall fluted columns on the left. The path leads toward a grand ceremonial staircase in the distance. A stone bench with blue drapery sits to the right, and a robed male statue becomes visible as the character approaches the stairs.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated terrace with golden warrior statue

events.description: beginning ascent of the wide grand staircase
reaching the top of the stairs and turning right around the terrace

agents.ego_description: climbing the ceremonial stairs and crossing the upper terrace, passing a golden statue

entered.detail: large gilded statue of an armored warrior with helmet, spear, and shield
high stone retaining wall supporting the elevated terrace

segments.scene_description: The character ascends the wide grand staircase toward an elevated terrace. At the top, a magnificent golden statue of an armored warrior stands prominently on the right. The character turns right and walks along the terrace, passing the robed male statue which now appears closer on the left, with a stone retaining wall on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: walled passage between terrace and market district

events.description: entering the narrow walled passage leading down from the terrace

agents.ego_description: walking down a narrow cobblestone passage flanked by high stone walls

notable_agents.action: woman in green dress walking toward the camera through the passage

entered.detail: high stone walls lining both sides of the narrow cobblestone path
bare-branched tree growing beside the stone wall
long building with row of columns and red tiled roof visible at the end of the passage

segments.scene_description: Descending from the terrace, the character enters a narrow passage enclosed by high stone walls on both sides. A leafless tree stands to the right. At the end of the passage, a colonnaded market building becomes visible. An NPC in a green dress walks toward the camera through this confined space.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered market colonnade with merchant stalls

events.description: entering the shaded area of the market colonnade
turning right to explore the market courtyard

agents.ego_description: walking through the market colonnade, passing merchant stalls and bronze urns

notable_agents.action: child running through the market square carrying goods

entered.detail: row of fluted stone columns supporting a roof with red tiles and blue awnings
large decorative bronze vessels flanking the market entrance
wooden market stall with blue fabric awning and displayed goods

segments.scene_description: Exiting the narrow passage, the character enters a bustling market colonnade. The space is partially covered by a roof supported by rows of fluted columns, creating shade. Large bronze urns and merchant stalls with blue awnings line the right side. The character turns right to explore the open courtyard area where a child runs past, and the market building now dominates the right side of the view.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey through the ancient city of Amphissa, transitioning from a monumental terrace into a bustling market district. It begins at a large sundial base beneath a vine-covered pergola, where dappled light filters over the stone as the camera ascends a wide staircase. As the character emerges into bright sunlight, the scene opens into a spacious civic plaza featuring a bannered watchtower and a flickering ceremonial brazier before shifting into a processional way lined with tall fluted columns. The camera then climbs a grand ceremonial staircase toward a magnificent golden statue of an armored warrior, eventually descending through a narrow stone passage with a leafless tree. Finally, the path opens into a shaded market colonnade filled with bronze urns and blue-awned merchant stalls, where the character turns to explore a lively open courtyard.
